customlist.name: Companion Prompt Governance Level
customlist.aidescription: Governance tier for a companion prompt. Controls how the AI orchestrates tool execution: minimal (single tool), standard (2-3 tool chain), governed (complex with safety checks), supervised (requires user confirmation for writes).

customvalue.aidescription: Single tool, read-only, low risk. AI executes directly and formats the result. Examples: barrel lookup, inventory count, single-record retrieval.
2-3 tool chain with moderate analysis. AI follows the tool chain, applies edition logic, and generates an artifact if flagged. Examples: cost trace, aging report, valuation.
Complex multi-tool investigation with safety checks. AI validates params, detects edition, executes steps, applies safety rules, flags anomalies. Examples: portfolio analysis, compliance audit.
High-impact operations that create or update records. AI requires user confirmation before each write operation and logs execution. Examples: prompt seeding, record updates, financial decisions.
